entities.name: Narrative Construction
entities.context: Primary technique for candidates to artificially close perceived skill/experience gaps in employer's mind

entities.name: Skill Gap Perception
entities.context: Employer's perceived deficiency that triggers avoidance response when candidate lacks proxy requirements

entities.name: Risk Management Under Uncertainty
entities.context: Fundamental nature of hiring - employers use requirements as proxies for safety

entities.name: Narrative Engineering
entities.context: Priority activity candidates should focus on over marginal skill acquisition

entities.name: Bad Hire Fear
entities.context: Employer's psychological state that narrative construction aims to mitigate

entities.name: Heuristic Hacking
entities.context: Effect of narrative on employer's risk assessment logic - providing alternative safety logic

entities.name: Transferable Grit
entities.context: Example narrative bridge that reframes gap as irrelevant

entities.name: Accelerated Learning
entities.context: Example narrative bridge that provides alternative safety logic

entities.name: Technical Parity
entities.context: Secondary concern to psychological mitigation in hiring context

relationships.context: Narrative bridges the gap by providing alternative logic for safety

Requirements serve as proxies for safety; gaps trigger avoidance
